# Test: apx workflows sync
# Verifies workflow regeneration from templates

# --- Setup: canonical repo with stale workflows ---
mkdir canonical-repo
cd canonical-repo
exec apx config init

# Create stale workflow files
mkdir -p .github/workflows
exec sh -c 'echo "old-ci-content" > .github/workflows/ci.yml'
exec sh -c 'echo "old-merge-content" > .github/workflows/on-merge.yml'

# Also create a canonical-looking directory
mkdir -p proto catalog

# Dry-run should not modify files
exec apx workflows sync --dry-run
stdout 'Would write'
stdout 'ci.yml'
stdout 'on-merge.yml'
stdout 'no files were modified'
grep 'old-ci-content' .github/workflows/ci.yml

# Actual sync should overwrite
exec apx workflows sync
stdout 'Updated'
stdout 'ci.yml'
stdout 'on-merge.yml'

# Verify the new content has the action reference
grep 'infobloxopen/apx@main' .github/workflows/ci.yml
grep 'infobloxopen/apx@main' .github/workflows/on-merge.yml

# Verify old content is gone
! grep 'old-ci-content' .github/workflows/ci.yml

# --- Setup: app repo with stale workflow ---
cd ..
mkdir app-repo
cd app-repo

# Create apx.yaml with org/repo and module_roots
cp $WORK/app-config.yaml apx.yaml

# Create stale release workflow
mkdir -p .github/workflows
exec sh -c 'echo "old-publish-content" > .github/workflows/apx-release.yml'

# Sync should regenerate
exec apx workflows sync
stdout 'Updated'
stdout 'apx-release.yml'
grep 'infobloxopen/apx@main' .github/workflows/apx-release.yml
! grep 'old-publish-content' .github/workflows/apx-release.yml

# --- No workflows and no structure: should error ---
cd ..
mkdir empty-repo
cd empty-repo
cp $WORK/minimal-config.yaml apx.yaml
! exec apx workflows sync
stderr 'could not determine repository type'

# Cleanup
cd ..
rm -rf canonical-repo app-repo empty-repo

-- app-config.yaml --
version: 1
org: testorg
repo: myapp
module_roots:
  - internal/apis/proto
-- minimal-config.yaml --
version: 1
org: testorg
repo: testrepo
